name: approach
description: Approach-space framers — the 'how' of work. Each skill takes a framed problem and produces an explicit approach contract (stages, workers, termination, failure handling) for the orchestrator to execute. Family: Pipeline, Swarm, Critic, Gated, Contract, Loop, One-shot, Event, Dialogue, Search, Blackboard. Plus Composer (the meta-skill that picks and composes the family). See ARCHITECTURE.md for the problem→frame→approach→solution model.
